changelog:
Updated AI chat dialog, now containing a list view instead of read-only edit field, allowing users to navigate messages with up / down arrows.
  If you still wish to read a message in edit field, you can do so by pressing enter on the message.
  If a message is longer than 1500 characters, it will also be split for easier reading and the full message can be viewed by pressing enter on it.
  The chat window title now shows the currently selected AI model.
  Some other improvements under the hood.
